heading: Officer affidavit; condition to pay
label: 5507 Officer affidavit; condition to pay
text: An officer required by to file an affidavit may not be paid until the affidavit has been filed.section 3332 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 21b, .Dec. 11, 1926, ch. 4, § 244 Stat. 919Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
